docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO MAR-27-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-06-2009 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AKERLUND, PAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JERRY LLC $320.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $320.00, *THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF'S APARTMENT WAS NOT SEPARATELY METERED AS REQUIRED BY THE PUBLIC UTILITIES CODE 780.5, AND THAT THE LEGAL PROVISIONS RELATED TO UTILITIES ARE NOT ADEQUATE TO PROVIDE THE DISCLOSURE REQUIRED BY CIVIL CODE 1940.9. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
FOR CERTIFIED MAIL ENTRY, SEE CASE NO. 827522
